description_long: This is a brown cowboy hat with a wide, flat brim and a flat-topped crown. The hat features a dark brown band encircling the base of the crown, providing a subtle contrast to the lighter brown body. The brim is angular and slightly upturned at the sides, giving it a classic Western silhouette. The crown is cylindrical and maintains a consistent height, lacking any pinches or creases. The surface appears matte and smooth, typical of felt or similar fabric. There are no visible decorative elements beyond the band, and the hat is designed for comfortable wear in outdoor urban settings.
description: A brown cowboy hat with a flat-topped crown, wide angular brim, and a dark brown band around the base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat-topped crown, wide angular brim, and the dark brown band clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat, wide brim and the cylindrical shape of the crown.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the band and brim visible but no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the flat, wide brim and the smooth crown.
attribute_brim_style: wide and flat with slightly upturned sides
